antipattern.symptom: Refactor commit also changes a return value or fixes a bug.
antipattern.root-cause: Author sees the fix inline and 'while I'm here' fixes it.
antipattern.fix: Split into two PRs: refactor first, fix second.

antipattern.root-cause: Author batches small changes for speed.
antipattern.fix: Reject; require one commit per transform.

antipattern.symptom: Rename done via grep-replace; misses dynamic-import strings or shadowed scopes.
antipattern.fix: Re-do the rename via LSP / IDE symbol rename.

antipattern.symptom: Extract function done; no test run between extract and the next move.
antipattern.root-cause: Loop step skipped to save time.
antipattern.fix: Re-run tests at the extract commit; if red, revert and try smaller extract.
